name: Beef Tourti=8are French Canadian Meat P=
recipeInstructions:
1. Boil the potatoes and mash them coarsely.
2. Heat oil in a large, heavy-duty frying pan. Brown the beef and onion.
3. Stir in mashed potatoes, allspice, cinnamon, garlic salt, salt, and pepper.
4. Preheat oven to 400°F (200°C).
5. Line two 9-inch pie pans with pastry. Fill each pan with meat mixture using a slotted spoon.
6. Cover the pies with top crusts, cutting vents so steam can escape.
7. Bake in the preheated oven for 45 minutes or until golden-brown.
